values.value: [Auto] Severity set to MEDIUM. Check destination airport's current METAR (`AFM_Site_Icao__c`) — IFR or LIFR conditions warrant escalation context. Check whether other inbound flights to the same site are also holding (count of currently-holding aircraft inbound to the destination — available via the `holding_count` field in detection facts). If holding extends past 30 minutes total, escalate to HIGH and re-evaluate whether the flight is likely to divert. [Auto] If holding clears (aircraft resumes direct path to destination), case auto-resolves on next refresh.
